name: Lead Generation System
goal: Register the existing finished production Lead Generation System in AG OS without modifying it.
knownFacts: Source currently lives on the owner's local computer.
GitHub repo does not exist yet.
AG OS must not modify this project yet.
scope: Register production-clean project metadata in AG OS.
Prepare future migration rules without touching the project.
outOfScope: Do not touch domain or DNS.
Do not read, copy, or store production or customer data.

risks.risk: Lead Gen is a finished production project with runtime, database, automation, and domain boundaries.
risks.mitigation: Keep AG OS in observe_only mode and limit this record to production-clean metadata.

qualityGates: No live service connection is added.
No credentials or production data are stored.
Future migration work uses a separate scoped PR.
securityReview: Production-clean registry metadata only. No credentials, endpoints, database names, workflow names, local paths, production exports, or customer data are recorded.
costTracking: No paid actions authorized. Future paid work requires Cost OS approval.
deploymentPlan: No deployment. Any deployment requires a future owner-approved scope with backup and rollback planning.
